description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a flat roof profile. The structure is composed of two main rectangular volumes, one larger and one smaller, connected by a central open area that appears to include a pool or water feature. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, likely concrete or stucco, with large glass windows along the main facade, providing ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The property includes a covered carport or garage area adjacent to the main building, and a spacious patio or terrace area surrounding the pool. The overall layout is horizontal and low-slung, emphasizing a strong connection to the surrounding landscape. The design is characterized by simplicity, functionality, and an emphasis on open, airy spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large glass windows, a pool, and a minimalist, horizontal layout. The structure features light exterior materials and a spacious patio area.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated main building, pool, and attached carport.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the pool, patio, and the smaller carport structure.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the main facade with large windows and the full length of the pool.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the main living area, glass windows, and the open terrace.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows in horizontal bands
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a minimalist door with a flat overhang, no visible steps, and a clean, open approach.
